backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Booking type and functions to submit bookings (submitBooking) and retrieve all bookings (getAllBookings) using a Map for storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three footer-related features: removing Caffeine.AI branding, adjusting footer spacing, and ensuring mobile responsiveness.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, configuration, and styling with emphasis on mobile-first typography and touch-friendly design.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including custom properties for background, foreground, primary, secondary, and other UI colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive local SEO meta tags (geo-location, Open Graph, LocalBusiness schema for San Fernando CA), Google Fonts preconnect, and optimized title/description.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component rendering Header, all page sections (Hero, About, Services, Booking, Gallery, Reviews, Contact), Footer, and StickyCallButton in sequence.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Marisol's image, 4.6-star rating with Star icons, salon description text, and mobile-first responsive typography in a two-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking form component with form state management, service selection dropdown, date/time inputs, and integration with useSubmitBooking mutation hook with toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Displays salon contact information including address, phone number, and business hours in a card-based layout with icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright notice with dynamic year for Marisol's Beauty Salon.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Gallery section showing transformation and interior salon images in a responsive grid with hover effects and image overlays.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed header with logo, desktop navigation menu, mobile hamburger menu, and call-to-action button with smooth scrolling to page sections.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, salon tagline, and prominent call-to-action buttons for booking appointments and calling.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays customer reviews with star ratings, overall rating summary, and individual testimonial cards in a responsive grid layout.
Showcases salon services (haircut, coloring, treatments, etc.) in cards with images, descriptions, and starting prices in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/StickyCallButton: Fixed bottom call button visible on mobile devices that displays phone number and links to tel: for direct calling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages Internet Identity authentication and creates backend actors, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for booking operations: useSubmitBooking mutation to create bookings and useGetAllBookings query to fetch all bookings from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with rose gold/beige/cream color palette, mobile-first typography, dark mode support, and custom utility classes for the beauty salon theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom rose gold/beige colors using OKLCH color space, typography plugin, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a mobile-first beauty salon website with rose gold aesthetic, featuring hero section, services, booking form, gallery, reviews, and contact sections with local SEO for San Fernando, CA.
